title: 理发
description_uz: «Bugun tushdan keyin soat uchga sartaroshga yozildim.» — Ikki do'st soch oldirish, narxlar va sartaroshxona tanlash haqida gaplashadi. Suhbat odatlar va narx haqida so'rash, do'kon tavsiya qilish va birga rejalashtirishni o'rgatadi. Soch turmagi va parvarishga oid kundalik so'zlar bor. Qisqa va sodda — soyalab takrorlash uchun ayni muddao.
description_ru: «Я записался к парикмахеру на сегодня на три часа дня.» — Двое друзей говорят о стрижке, ценах и выборе салона. Диалог учит спрашивать о привычках и цене, рекомендовать заведение и договариваться вместе. Полезная лексика про причёску и уход за волосами. Короткий и простой — отлично подходит для шэдоуинга.
description_en: «I booked a barber for three o'clock this afternoon.» — Two friends talk about haircuts, prices, and choosing a salon. The chat practises asking about habits and cost, recommending a place, and making plans together. It carries everyday words for hairstyles and upkeep. Short and simple — perfect for shadowing.

sentences.text_original: 你头发好像长了，准备去剪吗？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ tóufa hǎoxiàng cháng le, zhǔnbèi qù jiǎn ma?
sentences.text_translation_ru: У тебя, кажется, волосы отросли — собираешься стричься?
sentences.text_translation_en: Your hair seems to have gotten long — planning to get it cut?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 对，我约了今天下午三点的理发师。
sentences.pinyin: Duì, wǒ yuē le jīntiān xiàwǔ sān diǎn de lǐfàshī.
sentences.text_translation: Ha, bugun tushdan keyin soat uchga sartaroshga yozildim.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Да, я записался к парикмахеру на сегодня на три часа дня.
sentences.text_translation_en: Yeah, I booked a barber for three o'clock this afternoon.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ yìbān qù nǎr jiǎn tóufa?
sentences.text_translation_en: Where do you usually get your hair cut?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我常去小区门口那家理发店，价格不贵，技术也不错。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ cháng qù xiǎoqū ménkǒu nà jiā lǐfàdiàn, jiàgé bú guì, jìshù yě búcuò.
sentences.text_translation: Ko'pincha turar joy darvozasi oldidagi sartaroshxonaga boraman, narxi qimmat emas, mahorati ham yaxshi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Чаще всего хожу в парикмахерскую у входа в наш район: и цена невысокая, и мастерство хорошее.
sentences.text_translation_en: I often go to the salon at the entrance of my neighborhood — the price isn't high and the skill is good.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_translation: Bir marta soch oldirish qancha turadi?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 男士剪发三十块，女士剪发贵一些。
sentences.pinyin: Nánshì jiǎnfà sānshí kuài, nǚshì jiǎnfà guì yì xiē.
sentences.text_translation: Erkaklar uchun soch oldirish o'ttiz yuan, ayollar uchun biroz qimmatroq.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Мужская стрижка — тридцать юаней, женская немного дороже.
sentences.text_translation_en: A men's cut is thirty yuan; a women's cut is a bit more expensive.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ píngshí huì huàn fǎxíng ma?
sentences.text_translation_en: Do you usually change your hairstyle?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 不会。我一直都是短头发，好打理。
sentences.pinyin: Bú huì. Wǒ yìzhí dōu shì duǎn tóufa, hǎo dǎlǐ.
sentences.text_translation: Yo'q. Men doim kalta soch qo'yaman, parvarishi oson.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Нет. У меня всегда короткие волосы, за ними легко ухаживать.
sentences.text_translation_en: No. I always keep my hair short — it's easy to manage.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 我也想剪头发，但是不知道哪个理发师好。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ yě xiǎng jiǎn tóufa, dànshì bù zhīdào nǎ ge lǐfàshī hǎo.
sentences.text_translation: Men ham soch oldirmoqchiman, lekin qaysi sartarosh yaxshiligini bilmayman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я тоже хочу подстричься, но не знаю, какой парикмахер хороший.
sentences.text_translation_en: I want to get a haircut too, but I don't know which barber is good.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 你可以跟我一起去，我帮你推荐我的理发师。
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ kěyǐ gēn wǒ yìqǐ qù, wǒ bāng nǐ tuījiàn wǒ de lǐfàshī.
sentences.text_translation: Men bilan birga borsang bo'ladi, o'z sartaroshimni senga tavsiya qilaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Можешь пойти со мной, я порекомендую тебе своего парикмахера.
sentences.text_translation_en: You can come with me — I'll recommend my barber to you.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 好啊！他今天下午有空吗？
sentences.pinyin: Hǎo a! Tā jīntiān xiàwǔ yǒu kòng ma?
sentences.text_translation: Yaxshi! U bugun tushdan keyin bo'shmi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Отлично! У него есть время сегодня днём?
sentences.text_translation_en: Great! Is he free this afternoon?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 应该有。我先帮你问一下。
sentences.pinyin: Yīnggāi yǒu. Wǒ xiān bāng nǐ wèn yí xià.
sentences.text_translation: Bo'lsa kerak. Avval sen uchun so'rab beraman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Должно быть. Я сначала спрошу за тебя.
sentences.text_translation_en: He probably is. Let me ask for you first.
sentences.speaker: B
